whitepaper.metaTitle: Permanente Brug Argitektuur — Institusionele Witskrif | MRC GlobalPay
whitepaper.metaDesc: Hoe maak staatlose adres-volharding outomatiese institusionele vereffening moontlik?
whitepaper.heroTitle: Infrastruktuur Volharding en Outomatiese Vereffeningspore vir Globale Institusionele Likiditeit
whitepaper.heroSub: Van kortstondige sessie-gebaseerde ruil na permanente, nie-bewaarnemende vereffeningsinfrastruktuur.
whitepaper.s1Body: In die huidige digitale bate-landskap veroorsaak die kortstondige ruilmodel sistemiese operasionele brosheid vir korporatiewe tesourie en industriële mynbou-operasies.
whitepaper.s2Body: MRC GlobalPay het die Permanente Brug ontwerp om gefragmenteerde likiditeit in 'n permanente finansiële nut te omskep.
whitepaper.vp1Desc: Elimineer die behoefte om met 'n koppelvlak te werk vir elke transaksie.
whitepaper.vp2Desc: Skaal operasies sonder om personeel te vermeerder.
whitepaper.vp3Desc: Verminder kopieer-plak foute en vervalde sessie-tydverstrykings.
whitepaper.tw1Desc: 'n Unieke deposito-adres word kriptografies aan 'n vooraf-geverifieerde eksterne bestemmingsbeursie gekoppel.
whitepaper.tw2Desc: Die protokol aktiveer outomaties 'n ruil via geoptimaliseerde likiditeitsroeies.
whitepaper.tw3Desc: Die bate-omskakeling vind plaas in 'n enkele logiese uitvoeringsblok.
whitepaper.tw4Desc: Geen sensitiewe bestemmingsdata word op gesentraliseerde bedieners gestoor nie.
whitepaper.miningDesc: Rig ASIC-belonings na 'n Permanente Brug vir outomatiese hedging na stablecoins.
whitepaper.corpDesc: Verskaf 'n enkele permanente adres aan globale kliënte.
whitepaper.hnwiDesc: Vestig volhardende omskakelingspore tussen wisselvallige besittings en stablecoin-reserwes.

shieldedWp.metaTitle: Beskermde Vereffeningsargitektuur — Institusionele Witskrif | MRC GlobalPay
shieldedWp.heroTitle: Ontkoppeling van On-Chain Identiteit: Beskermde Vereffeningsargitektuur vir Korporatiewe Privaatheidssoewereiniteit
shieldedWp.heroSub: Breek die deterministiese skakel tussen bron- en bestemmingsbeursies deur nie-bewaarnemende roetevinding.
shieldedWp.s1Title: Die Sistemiese Risiko van Publieke Grootboek-deursigtigheid
shieldedWp.s1Body: Elke on-chain transaksie skep 'n permanente rekord. Vir korporatiewe tesourie is hierdie deursigtigheid 'n sistemiese aanspreeklikheid.
shieldedWp.s2Body: MRC GlobalPay se Beskermde Vereffeningsargitektuur implementeer 'n driefase-ontkoppelingsprotokol.
shieldedWp.ph1Desc: Fondse tree die MRC Likiditeitslaag binne deur nie-bewaarnemende roetevinding.
shieldedWp.ph2Desc: Die protokol pas wiskundige onderbreking van die deterministiese skakel toe.
shieldedWp.ph3Desc: Vereffening kom van neutrale likiditeitsnodusse sonder naspoorbare verbinding.
shieldedWp.s3Title: Beskermde Vereffeningspore is Nie Mengers Nie
shieldedWp.s3Body: Dit is krities om tussen hoërisiko-mengers en institusionele beskermde vereffeningspore te onderskei.
shieldedWp.insulationDesc: Skuif fondse tussen koue berging en warm beursies sonder 'n publieke spoor.

sovereignWp.metaTitle: The Sovereign Settlement — Institutional Whitepaper | MRC GlobalPay
sovereignWp.metaDesc: How does stateless invoicing bypass correspondent banking? MRC GlobalPay's Sovereign Settlement protocol provides 168-hour exchange rate certainty for global commerce.
sovereignWp.heroTitle: The Sovereign Settlement: Die Wrywing van Globale Handel Uitwis
sovereignWp.heroSub: The legacy financial system is no longer a facilitator of trade; it is a tax on it. MRC GlobalPay introduces Stateless Invoicing — a protocol designed to bypass correspondent banking and provide 168-hour exchange rate certainty.
sovereignWp.s1Tag: Section I — The Illusion of Liquidity
sovereignWp.s1Title: Traditional Banking Is Failing Global Commerce
sovereignWp.s1Body: Traditional banking relies on a fragile web of Vostro and Nostro accounts. This 'Ghost in the Machine' creates an illusion of liquidity while hiding systemic delays and predatory intermediary fees. Whether you are using an LTC Transaction Tracker to monitor movement or waiting on a standard wire, the friction remains the same. We replace human trust with mathematical certainty. By utilizing an ETH to SOL bridge architecture for high-speed cross-chain movement, we ensure that capital is never 'stuck' in the pipes of a legacy bank.
sovereignWp.s2Tag: Section II — The 168-Hour Immutable Rate Lock
sovereignWp.s2Title: A 7-Day Volatility Shield for Global Settlement
sovereignWp.s2Body: Volatility is the primary deterrent for corporate digital asset adoption. In the time it takes to settle a gold or iron ore contract, market fluctuations can erase profit margins. MRC GlobalPay eliminates this risk with a 7-Day Volatility Shield.
sovereignWp.lockDesc: Once an invoice is generated, the exchange rate is frozen for 168 hours. This provides the stability of a Letter of Credit without the bank fee.
sovereignWp.guaranteeDesc: We absorb the market movement, ensuring that the amount sent is exactly the amount received. No surprises, no renegotiation.
sovereignWp.s3Tag: Section III — Privacy and Financial Sovereignty
sovereignWp.s3Body: In an era of increasing financial surveillance, maintaining a Direct Responsibility Framework is essential for the global elite. We recognize the need for privacy-centric tools, providing the best way to buy Monero no KYC logic — where the user retains total control over their data and their assets. Sovereignty isn't just about owning your money; it's about owning the speed and privacy at which it moves.
sovereignWp.s4Title: What You See Is What You Get
sovereignWp.s4Body: We have eliminated the 'hidden fee' culture of fintech. Transparency is our priority. Our 0.5% fee is baked into the quoted rate.
sovereignWp.feeDesc: All operational costs are baked into the quoted rate. No additional charges, no surprises.
sovereignWp.gasDesc: We handle the complexity of the underlying blockchain networks. You never pay extra for gas.
sovereignWp.finalityDesc: Settlement happens at the speed of the protocol, not the speed of a bank's working hours.
sovereignWp.ctaDesc: Generate a rate-locked invoice in under 30 seconds. 500+ assets, 168-hour certainty, zero registration.

lend.complianceText: As 'n geregistreerde Kanadese Gelddienstemaatskappy (MSB — Registrasienr. C100000015), volg alle leningsbedrywighede via MRC GlobalPay die federale Anti-Geldwassery (AML) en Anti-Terreurfinansiering (ATF) riglyne. Kriptovaluta-lenings behels risiko. Kollateraal kan gelikwideer word as pryse onder die likwidasiedrempel val. Dit is nie finansiële advies nie.
lend.earnSubtitle: Verdien mededingende opbrengs op jou kripto — geen sluitperiode.

loanFaq.q1: Wat gebeur as die prys van my onderpand daal?
loanFaq.a1: Alle leningsposisies word 24/7 gemonitor deur ons infrastruktuurvennoot se outomatiese risiko-enjin. As die onderpandwaarde die Geel Sone (Risiko) betree, sal SMS en e-pos waarskuwings gestuur word. In die Rooi Sone (Likwidasie) sal likwidasie uitgevoer word. Vrywaring: MRC Global Pay verskaf die koppelvlak; monitering en likwidasie word deur ons tegnologievennoot bestuur.
loanFaq.a2: Nee. Die enigste koste is die deursigtige rentekoers (APR).
loanFaq.a3: Rente is gebaseer op die APR spesifiek vir jou bate en LTV vlak.
loanFaq.q4: Kan ek my lening vroeg terugbetaal?
loanFaq.q5: Watter LTV verhouding moet ek kies?
loanFaq.a5: Dit hang af van jou risikotoleransie. 50% LTV is die veiligste. 70% is gebalanseerd.
loanFaq.q6: Is daar 'n minimum of maksimum leningsbedrag?
loanFaq.a6: Minimum hang af van die bate en word in die sakrekenaar getoon.

earnFaq.a1: Nee. MRC GlobalPay Earn is heeltemal buigsaam. Onttrek 24/7 sonder boetes.
earnFaq.a2: Rente loop daagliks op en word outomaties saamgestel.
earnFaq.a4: Alle fondse is beveilig in multisig koue-berging beursies onder Kanadese MSB (C100000015) toesig.
earnFaq.a5: Nee. Geen deposito-, onttrekkings- of bestuursfooie nie.

lendGuide.riskZoneTip: Alle leningsposisies word 24/7 gemonitor deur ons vennoot se outomatiese risiko-enjin. Geel Sone aktiveer SMS en e-pos waarskuwings. Rooi Sone aktiveer outomatiese likwidasie.
lendGuide.riskZoneDisclaimer: Vrywaring: MRC Global Pay verskaf die koppelvlak vir hierdie dienste; monitering, waarskuwingsaflewering en likwidasie-uitvoering word uitsluitlik deur ons tegnologievennoot bestuur.

portal.docsCommissionDesc: Your earned commission on this transaction (BTC).
portal.docsCommissionDesc2: All transactions routed through the Partner API are subject to an automated 0.4% commission, calculated on the total transaction volume and credited in BTC.
portal.docsLedgerDesc: Each transaction is logged with a unique MRC Transaction ID, volume, commission, and payment status. Review your full ledger in the API Ledger section.
portal.docsPartnerIdDesc: Your unique Partner ID from the Partner Hub overview.
portal.docsRecipientDesc: Destination wallet address for the converted funds.
portal.docsResponseDesc: On success, returns 200 with the internal MRC transaction ID and a deposit address. The partner must instruct the end-user to send funds to the payin_address.
portal.docsSettlement1: Commissions accrue in real-time to your Available Balance.
portal.docsSettlement2: Completed transactions auto-credit to the BTC wallet on your partner profile.
portal.docsSettlement3: Pending settlements are visible in the API Ledger under 'Pending Settlement'.
portal.docsStep1: Extract the X-MRC-Signature header from the incoming request.
portal.docsStep2: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of the raw JSON body using your API Secret.
portal.docsStep3: Compare your computed signature with the header value. Reject if they differ.
portal.docsSwapDesc: Initiate a swap order through the MRC liquidity proxy. The system validates your credentials, logs the transaction internally, and relays the order to our liquidity network.
portal.docsWebhookDesc: When a transaction status changes, MRC dispatches a POST request to your configured Webhook URL. Each payload is signed with HMAC-SHA256 using your API Secret as the key.
portal.tryItDesc: Execute a mock swap to preview the JSON response and webhook dispatch behavior.
